docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-17-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-20-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARK, CAITLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,895.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $900 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, CAITLIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, CAITLIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-20-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $33.75 ACCRUED INTEREST, $25.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $992.46 AS TO DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED JUL-16-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY CLARK, CAITLIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARCAN, BAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, CAITLIN
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, CAITLIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.
